hooks.command: [ -d .git ] || exit 0; [ -f .vault-meta/auto-commit.disabled ] && exit 0; LAST=$(git log -1 --format='%s' 2>/dev/null); echo "$LAST" | grep -qE '^wiki: auto-commit [0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$' || exit 0; HKT=$(TZ='Asia/Hong_Kong' date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z'); git commit --amend --no-edit -m "wiki: auto-commit $HKT" 2>/dev/null || true
